title: UCSL Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 15 Assistant Manager Posts
description: The Udupi Cochin Shipyard (UCSL) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 15 Assistant Manager Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their M.E./M. Tech, B.E./B. Tech in Electrical and Mechanical Engineering can apply for the UCSL Notification 2026. The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, age...
